titles.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory Upon One Who Sets Fire to the House of a People, Causing the House and Its Inhabitants to Burn
Chapter on What is Obligatory Upon One Who Sets Fire to the House of a People, Causing the House and Its Inhabitants to Burn

segments: 5368 - فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ : "أَنَّ عَلِيّاً عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَضَى فِي رَجُلٍ أَقْبَلَ بِنَارٍ فَأَشْعَلَهَا فِي دَارِ قَوْمٍ فَاحْتَرَقَتِ اَلدَّارُ وَ اِحْتَرَقَ أَهْلُهَا وَ اِحْتَرَقَ مَتَاعُهُمْ قَالَ "يُغَرَّمُ قِيمَةَ اَلدَّارِ وَ مَا فِيهَا ثُمَّ يُقْتَلُ" ".
arabic.text: 5368 - فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ : "أَنَّ عَلِيّاً عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَضَى فِي رَجُلٍ أَقْبَلَ بِنَارٍ فَأَشْعَلَهَا فِي دَارِ قَوْمٍ فَاحْتَرَقَتِ اَلدَّارُ وَ اِحْتَرَقَ أَهْلُهَا وَ اِحْتَرَقَ مَتَاعُهُمْ قَالَ "يُغَرَّمُ قِيمَةَ اَلدَّارِ وَ مَا فِيهَا ثُمَّ يُقْتَلُ" ".

segments:
Hadith.5368 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni: "Indeed, Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) ruled regarding a man who came with fire and set it ablaze in the house of some people, causing the house, its inhabitants, and their belongings to burn.
Imam (as) said: 'He must compensate for the value of the house and everything in it, and then he is to be executed.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5368 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni: "Indeed, Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) ruled regarding a man who came with fire and set it ablaze in the house of some people, causing the house, its inhabitants, and their belongings to burn.
Imam (as) said: 'He must compensate for the value of the house and everything in it, and then he is to be executed.'"
